actions.expression:
SELECT ozycs.sid,
       ozycs.cs_id,
       ozycs.company_name,
       ozycs.csjc,
       ozycs.twhm,
       ozycs.province1,
       ozycs.city1,
       ozycs.cslxr,
       ozycs.lxrjb,
       ozycs.phone,
       ozycs.fax,
       ozycs.sjhm,
       ozycs.sfxy,
       ozycs.gsgm,
       ozycs.qyQQ,
       ozycs.address,
       ozycs.yzbm,
       ozycs.email,
       ozycs.web,
       ozycs.gcsx,
       ozycs.province,
       ozycs.bjry,
       ozycs.djrq,
       ozycs.zh,
       ozycs.kkppm,
       ozycs.gcxq,
       ozycs.fkhm,
       ozycs.bank1,
       ozycs.zh1,
       ozycs.hyd,
       ozycs.kpgc,
       ozycs.kplxr,
       ozycs.kpdh,
       ozycs.gcly,
       ozycs.zhkp,
       ozycs.zjgc,
       ozycs.jthz,
       ozycs.yczz1,
       ozycs.hzgs,
       ozycs.yczz,
       ozycs.beizh,
       ozycs.lbda,
       ozycs.bgs,
       ozycs.gcwg,
       ozycs.gcwg1,
       ozycs.gcwg2,
       ozycs.sccj1,
       ozycs.sccj4,
       ozycs.sccj3,
       ozycs.ck,
       ozycs.yclt1,
       ozycs.ycl2,
       ozycs.ypj,
       ozycs.zzjg,
       ozycs.gccptp,
       ozycs.swdjz,
       ozycs.sccj2,
       ozycs.grtp,
       ozycs.qttp,
       ozycs.yyzz,
       ozycs.gcqz,
       ozycs.nsrdjb,
       ozycs.nssbb
FROM ozycs 
WHERE permission('专业工厂')
ORDER BY ozycs.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT newcwcs.sid,
       newcwcs.company_name,
       newcwcs.bank,
       newcwcs.zh,
       newcwcs.shui
FROM newcwcs 
ORDER BY newcwcs.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.sid,
       ywrybiao.bm,
       ywrybiao.ydhm,
       ywrybiao.sjdh,
       ywrybiao.lxdh,
       ywrybiao.bmjl,
       ywrybiao.jldh
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.yhm=[工厂拜访.登 记 人]) 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT wb1,
       wb2,
       wb3,
       wb4,
       wb5,
       wb8,
       wb9
FROM zx 
WHERE (ly="付款审批") 
  AND (wb1=[工厂拜访.提交主管])

actions.name: 事_提交总监
actions.caption: 事_提交总监

fields.caption: 总经理
fields.output: 工厂拜访.总 经 理

actions.expression:
SELECT wb3 
FROM zx 
WHERE (ly="付款审批") 
  AND (wb2=[工厂拜访.总   监]) LIMIT 1

actions.name: 潜在工厂资料
actions.caption: 潜在工厂资料
actions.expression:
SELECT ozycs.sid 
FROM ozycs 
WHERE (ozycs.cs_id=[工厂拜访.拜访名单.厂商编号]) 
ORDER BY ozycs.sid ASC

actions.name: 费用申请
actions.caption: 费用申请
actions.expression:
SELECT fysq.sid 
FROM fysq 
WHERE (fysq.bfdh=[工厂拜访.拜访单号]) 
ORDER BY fysq.sid ASC

actions.name: 工厂拜访.拜访费用.费用合计
actions.caption: 工厂拜访.拜访费用.费用合计
actions.expression: [工厂拜访.拜访费用.机票费用]+[工厂拜访.拜访费用.火车票费用]+[工厂拜访.拜访费用.汽车(含自驾)费用]+[工厂拜访.拜访费用.其他交通费用]+[工厂拜访.拜访费用.酒店费用]+[工厂拜访.拜访费用.餐饮费用]+[工厂拜访.拜访费用.其它费用]

       ozycs.grtp,
       ozycs.qttp,
       ozycs.yyzz,
       ozycs.gcqz,
       ozycs.nsrdjb,
       ozycs.nssbb
FROM ozycs 
WHERE permission('专业工厂') and ozycs.company_name=[工厂拜访.拜访名单.厂商名称]
ORDER BY ozycs.sid ASC
